data.title: GENESIS INSPIRATION FOUNDATION CELEBRATES $16 MILLION INVESTED IN YOUTH ARTS EDUCATION
data.description: The Genesis Inspiration Foundation has achieved a significant milestone in its ongoing mission to empower youth across the country with opportunities for creativity and access. This 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization, based in New York, has been dedicated to fostering education and enriching the lives of young people. The foundation's impact reaches nationwide, highlighting its commitment to providing valuable platforms for the development and growth of the next generation.

data.title: Jack Kent Cooke Foundation Announces 2026 College Scholarship Recipients
data.description: In Lansdowne, Virginia, on April 1, 2026, the Jack Kent Cooke Foundation disclosed that 60 high school seniors received the Cooke College Scholarship for the year 2026. This scholarship is a notable honor as it provides additional financial aid to cover any remaining expenses after other scholarships and grants have been applied.

data.title: Sasol issues US dollar senior notes
data.description: This news information, dated April 1, 2026, from Johannesburg, states that Sasol Limited has disclosed the announcement that its subsidiary, Sasol Financing USA LLC, will be involved in certain financial transactions. The subsidiary is fully owned by Sasol Limited. The details also mention that the information should not be released, published, or distributed in any jurisdiction where such actions are considered unlawful.

data.title: Stocktwits to Offer CME Group Futures Data to Its Community of 10 Million Investors & Traders
data.description: Stocktwits users now have the ability to utilize CME Group futures data covering global financial and commodities markets. In a recent update on April 1, 2026, Stocktwits, a prominent social platform for investors and traders, revealed that users can now engage with interactive charts to track market trends and make informed decisions. This development signifies a major enhancement for users seeking real-time information, with the inclusion of vital data points to guide their investment strategies.

data.title: Navy Federal Credit Union Recognized as ‘100 Best Companies to Work For®’ for the 15th Consecutive Year
data.description: In Vienna, Virginia, Navy Federal Credit Union has been honored as one of the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® for the 15th consecutive year, and the 16th time overall. The chief human resources officer, Holly Kortright, emphasized the significance of this achievement, attributing it to the dedicated workforce that embodies the organization's mission. The recognition underscores the strong culture of purpose and inclusivity that Navy Federal has cultivated, positioning it among the most esteemed workplaces in the country.

data.title: Harvey AI lists 5 criteria for legal firms to boost AI implementation, despite low adoption rates beyond initial users.
data.description: Harvey, a legal AI startup, has released a framework that sheds light on the challenges faced by law firms in scaling AI adoption. Despite the widespread deployment of AI tools, the framework shows why most law firms struggle to expand adoption beyond early adopters. This research highlights key insights into the barriers preventing effective scaling of AI in the legal industry.

data.title: Merck Locks Infinimmune Alliance To Chase Next-Gen Antibody Drugs
data.description: Biotechnology company Infinimmune Inc. has announced a partnership with Merck & Co Inc. (NYSE: MRK) to create antibody candidates using its innovative human-first discovery platform. This collaboration allows Merck to utilize Infinimmune's technologies to develop therapies for various undisclosed programs. Merck has secured exclusive rights to develop and commercialize the antibody candidates resulting from this collaboration. As per the agreement, Infinimmune will receive an upfront payment of an undisclosed amount and stands to earn milestone payments linked to the progress of multiple antibody candidates, which could total up to around $838 million. Infinimmune's Anthrobody discovery platform, blending human data with machine learning, will be at the core of this partnership.

data.title: MCAP Inc. Reports 4Q and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on April 1, 2026, MCAP Inc. announced their fourth quarter 2025 earnings of $0.13 per diluted share, marking a 40% increase from the previous quarter. They reported an EBITDA of $4.7 million for the same period. For the full year ending December 31, 2025, the company disclosed revenue of $105 million, Net Trading Income of $75 million, and EBITDA of $21 million, with earnings per share of $0.59. The Platform Solutions division, including QwickRoute, played a significant role in these results. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
